Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Man, Chidori wasn't at the station today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 6 25 25}{f 4 21 3 10}Nah, on second thought, I better stay put. The operation's tonight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}When it comes down to it, we're fightin' to protect her, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Wow, thinkin' about it like that kinda fires me up...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Maybe we really are, like, heroes of justice...[n]{f 1 1}
